who: procurement managers in small to medium-sized e-commerce businesses processing 10-20 invoices/month
offer: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized e-commerce businesses processing 10-20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes late payments and supplier penalties. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
problem: manual reconciliation of vendor invoices with purchase orders
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
Direct message 20-50 procurement managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for sharing tools and resources
try_it: Let users try weekly email reports and user-friendly dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick access
Set default reminder schedules for tasks
Allow CSV import for existing invoice data
Enable one-click export for simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
